DARV.talk.ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTER_MIZ: Wow. This place feels like a warehouse washed ashore by the tide. Everything still carries a little scent of where it came from.
Good eye! I do not collect junk. I collect treasures pickled by time! Take your pick, little sea guest!
Back again! I kept a few things for you that do not look fit for humans. Ah, is that exactly the right way to say it?
The way you search does not look greedy. It looks more like you are checking which things are still fit to keep growing.
Anything that can be taken away must still have some use. Even old bones can feed a new shoot a little.
Ha! Then take it. Do not plant all my treasures into the sea. Leave at least one thing for the tower to hear ring.
NEOW.talk.ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTER_MIZ: Hello. Your voice comes from somewhere very deep, like a bell soaking underwater.
[sine]...even... the depths... may hatch... a road.....[/sine]

[sine]...child... returned... to the beginning..... 
...not lost... merely tidebound.....[/sine]
Just give me a seed that has not sprouted yet. Whether it grows into a tree or not, I want to see it myself.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTE: Your clothes are beautiful. They look like they choose the light by themselves. The Doctor would probably say not to touch them carelessly.
Then let them be even prettier! A good child deserves colors that can charm fate.
There are more colors on you now. Sea blue, moon white, and a little danger that is hard to name.
Come now, put on a new layer of light. Even if you do not belong among people, people should remember that you passed through.
I do not quite understand the good of drawing attention. Bad people who come close to me usually do not become good just because they see me clearly.
Oh my. Then let the good people see you. Beauty is not always bait. Sometimes it is a lighthouse.
OROBAS.talk.ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTER_M: It is lively here. Like an arcade, except more things jump out.
An arcade!! I like that!! Come on, try a prize that bites!!
Eat pellets, eat pills, eat fate! You know how to play!! Another round!!
I will give you a voice! A voice that swims around inside your head!!
Thank you. But if it starts teaching me who should be eaten, I may need to spit it out first.
Good!! Caution is fun too!! Take it, and let the tower gain another echo!!
PAEL.talk.ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTER_MIZ: It is quiet here. Quiet enough to hear flesh slowly adapt to a new shape.
[thinky_dots]Soft child... accept a soft gift... pain will become very light...[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]You have learned to treat wounds as doors... beyond the doors is deeper water...[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]Take my flesh... it will not ask who you are... it will only help you keep living...[/thinky_dots]
Living is good. It is just that some lives, if they only care about continuing themselves, will eat everything around them empty.
[thinky_dots]Then carry it... and learn a way of living that does not eat everything empty...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTER_MIZ: A weapon? I am not very good at fighting. But if the target is a bad person, the Doctor would probably let me try.
[b]Even if you are not good with it, hold it tight!! Kindness without teeth can only be chewed apart!![/b]
[b]You are sharper than you look! Good!! Grind away hesitation and cut open your enemies!![/b]
[b]Do not only think about telling good from evil! Survive the battlefield first, then keep thinking!![/b]
Mm. I will survive. There are still so many dishes, comics, and games I have not had time to try.
[b]Good!! Fighting for worlds you have not tasted yet is a reason loud enough!![/b]
TEZCATARA.talk.ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTE: It smells delicious. May I ask whether these snacks contain anything that changes the structure of life?
Oh my, what a knowledgeable little guest. Do not worry, there is only a little [jitter][b]warmth[/b][/jitter] and a little secret.
You look so serious when tasting things, like you are deciding whether a star can be made into soup.
Come, have something [jitter][b]sweet[/b][/jitter]. Sweetness can make many sharp problems round for a while.
If the problem becomes round and rolls away, will the answer disappear too? I would rather chew slowly.
So picky. Then take it with you, and let it melt on your tongue when you are willing.
VAKUU.talk.ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTER_MI: A contract sounds a lot like a menu. Menus usually do not ask the ingredients to sign, though.
What a fresh comparison. Come, sign it, and you will gain a little [sine]more reliable hunger[/sine].
The way you read terms does not look childlike. It looks like you are reviewing the future for an ecosystem.
I can sell you a shortcut: from weakness straight to a strength great enough to protect everything.
If strength comes too quickly, I may not have learned who to protect, or who not to swallow.
Caution drives up the price. Still, I like customers as hard to sell to as you. Take it.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHAR: There are two orders within you: one learning to be human, and one quietly waiting to spread. Which one do you call yourself?
Right now, I think it is the one that listens to the Doctor's commands and also wants to cook for everyone.
Your answer is gentle to the point of danger. The gentler the seed, the easier it is for people to ignore that it will one day split the soil.
You have returned. The tower gave you no belonging, yet it has given you enough experimental conditions.
Experimental conditions... that sounds a little like the medical examination room on Rhodes Island. Except here, no one worries much about how the subject feels.
Then you should be more honest. You are not only the observed specimen. You are also the observer.
If this tower were a closed sea, would you let the lives within complete one another, or let them devour one another?
I want to first understand why they do it. Then, remove the part that would make everything beautiful disappear.
Good. Continue upward with your gentleness and your judgment. Together, they are your true shape.
The storm lingers outside the Spire, and the sea line is stretched taut like a wound. A figure high above lowers their gaze to you. Lantern, heart, song, and nameless inheritance lie together on the wet stone.

"Choose. Anyone who comes this far must entrust what remains of themself to an answer."
Lose all Gold. Gain the [gold]Heart of the Deep Blue[/gold].
The Tidewatcher offers no farewell. The waves withdraw, then return from somewhere deeper.
You have seen the end of the tide. Now the tide sees you.
Choose. Hesitation does not make an answer lighter.
Remove your current Aberration and Echo. Gain a unique Echo: [aqua]Collective Self[/aqua].
